headline: Simply Good Foods (SMPL) Q2 Earnings Beat Estimates
summary: Simply Good Foods (SMPL) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +13.21% and -5.46%, respectively, for the quarter ended February 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
